'''zopadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ataxonomic|ataxonomic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ataxonomic|ataxonomic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zopadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zopadithi|zopadithi]] || [[word:zopadiji|zopadiji]] || [[word:zopadishi|zopadishi]] || [[word:zopadiki|zopadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zopaduthuthu|zopaduthuthu]] || [[word:zopadujuju|zopadujuju]] || [[word:zopadushushu|zopadushushu]] || [[word:zopadukuku|zopadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zopaduthu|zopaduthu]] || [[word:zopaduju|zopaduju]] || [[word:zopadushu|zopadushu]] || [[word:zopaduku|zopaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zopadufthuf|zopadufthuf]] || [[word:zopadufjuf|zopadufjuf]] || [[word:zopadufshuf|zopadufshuf]] || [[word:zopadufkuf|zopadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zopadethe|zopadethe]] || [[word:zopadeje|zopadeje]] || [[word:zopadeshe|zopadeshe]] || [[word:zopadeke|zopadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zopadothotho|zopadothotho]] || [[word:zopadojojo|zopadojojo]] || [[word:zopadoshosho|zopadoshosho]] || [[word:zopadokoko|zopadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zopadotho|zopadotho]] || [[word:zopadojo|zopadojo]] || [[word:zopadosho|zopadosho]] || [[word:zopadoko|zopadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zopadofthof|zopadofthof]] || [[word:zopadofjof|zopadofjof]] || [[word:zopadofshof|zopadofshof]] || [[word:zopadofkof|zopadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfthÃŸf|zopadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfjÃŸf|zopadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfshÃŸf|zopadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfkÃŸf|zopadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zopadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zopadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zopadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zopadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfthÃŸf|zopadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfjÃŸf|zopadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfshÃŸf|zopadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfkÃŸf|zopadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfthÃŸf|zopadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfjÃŸf|zopadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfshÃŸf|zopadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zopadÃŸfkÃŸf|zopadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zopadÃḊthÃḊ|zopadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zopadÃḊjÃḊ|zopadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zopadÃḊshÃḊ|zopadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zopadÃḊkÃḊ|zopadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zopadathatha|zopadathatha]] || [[word:zopadajaja|zopadajaja]] || [[word:zopadashasha|zopadashasha]] || [[word:zopadakaka|zopadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zopadatha|zopadatha]] || [[word:zopadaja|zopadaja]] || [[word:zopadasha|zopadasha]] || [[word:zopadaka|zopadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zopadafthaf|zopadafthaf]] || [[word:zopadafjaf|zopadafjaf]] || [[word:zopadafshaf|zopadafshaf]] || [[word:zopadafkaf|zopadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zopadasha|zopadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zopadshÃḋsha|zopadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zopadrosha|zopadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zopadmusha|zopadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zopadyasha|zopadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozopadnkshÃḋsha|gozopadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozopadnkrosha|gozopadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozopadnkmusha|gozopadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozopadnkyasha|gozopadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zopapadasha|zopapadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zopapadshÃḋsha|zopapadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zopapadrosha|zopapadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zopapadmusha|zopapadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zopapadyasha|zopapadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozopapadnkshÃḋsha|gozopapadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozopapadnkrosha|gozopapadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozopapadnkmusha|gozopapadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozopapadnkyasha|gozopapadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zepÃḊdasha|zepÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zepÃḊdshÃḋsha|zepÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zepÃḊdrosha|zepÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zepÃḊdmusha|zepÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zepÃḊdyasha|zepÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozepÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|gozepÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozepÃḊdnkrosha|gozepÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozepÃḊdnkmusha|gozepÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozepÃḊdnkyasha|gozepÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zopfadasha|zopfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zopfadshÃḋsha|zopfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zopfadrosha|zopfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zopfadmusha|zopfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zopfadyasha|zopfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozopfadnkshÃḋsha|gozopfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozopfadnkrosha|gozopfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozopfadnkmusha|gozopfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozopfadnkyasha|gozopfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
